name: ultra11y
description: Audit HTML/CSS/JSX against WCAG 2.2 AA and produce a dated compliance report, or author/review accessible markup (native-HTML-first). A skills.sh agent skill: an install-free static engine (bundled, no npm install) plus the agent's judgment, with check/verify gates against hallucinated non-conformities, and pluggable in-repo standards packs (RGAA France first; Section 508 & EN 301 549 next).

scripts.check:build: tsup && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- scripts/ultra11y.mjs skills/ultra11y/scripts/ultra11y.mjs skills/review-a11y/scripts/ultra11y.mjs && node scripts/verify-skill-bundle.mjs && node scripts/sync-engine.mjs --check
scripts.demo: node scripts/ultra11y.mjs audit tests/fixtures/non-conforming/bad.html --out /tmp/ultra11y-demo --json > /dev/null && node scripts/ultra11y.mjs report --in /tmp/ultra11y-demo/audit-latest.json --out /tmp/ultra11y-demo && node scripts/ultra11y.mjs check --report /tmp/ultra11y-demo/wcag-*.md && node scripts/ultra11y.mjs criteria --list

author: maxgfr
